User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the system, including customers and staff.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

role.description: The user's role within the system (e.g., admin, staff, customer).

addresses.description: An array of addresses associated with the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the order entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who placed the order. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Order)

items.description: An array of items included in the order.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., placed, preparing, ready, delivered).

orderType.description: The type of order (e.g., dine-in, takeaway, delivery).

tableNumber.description: The table number for dine-in orders.

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the order.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the order was placed.

MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: Represents an item on the restaurant's menu.

id.description: Unique identifier for the menu item entity.

name.description: The name of the menu item.

category.description: The category of the menu item (e.g., Starters, Mains, Drinks).

price.description: The price of the menu item.

imageURL.description: URL of the menu item's image.

availability.description: Indicates whether the menu item is currently available.

InventoryItem.title: InventoryItem
InventoryItem.description: Represents an item in the restaurant's inventory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the inventory item entity.

name.description: The name of the inventory item.

quantity.description: The current quantity of the inventory item.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the inventory item (e.g., kg, liter).

alertLevel.description: The stock level at which an alert should be triggered.

Bill.title: Bill
Bill.description: Represents a bill generated for an order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the bill entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order associated with this bill. (Relationship: Order 1:1 Bill)

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the bill.

tax.description: The amount of tax included in the bill.

discount.description: The amount of discount applied to the bill.

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment used for the bill (e.g., Cash, Card, UPI, Online).

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the bill was generated.

id.description: Unique identifier for the reservation entity.

userId.description: The ID of the user who made the reservation. (Relationship: User 1:N Reservation)

name.description: The name of the person who made the reservation.

phone.description: The phone number of the person who made the reservation.

guests.description: The number of guests for the reservation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the staff entity.

name.description: The name of the staff member.

role.description: The role of the staff member.

shiftTimes.description: An array of shift times for the staff member.

clockInHistory.description: An array of clock-in history entries for the staff member.

id.description: Unique identifier for the notification entity.

createdAt.description: The timestamp of when the notification was created.

userId.description: Reference to the User who this notification is for. (Relationship: User 1:N Notification)

id.description: Unique identifier for the vendor entity.

code.description: A unique code for the vendor.

profitMargin.description: The profit margin percentage for products from this vendor.

SubscriptionPlan.title: SubscriptionPlan
SubscriptionPlan.description: Represents a subscription plan offered to users.

name.description: The display name of the plan.

price.description: The price of the plan, formatted as a string (e.g., '₹4,999', 'Custom').

pricePeriod.description: The billing period for the price (e.g., '/month').

description.description: A short description of the plan.

trialDays.description: Duration of the free trial in days. Only applicable to trial plans.

features.description: A list of features included in the plan.

cta.description: The call-to-action text for the plan's button.

variant.description: The visual style of the plan's button.

definition.description: Stores user data. Includes denormalized 'role' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores order data. Associated with a user via 'customerId'.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order.

params.name: menuItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the menu item.

params.name: inventoryItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the inventory item.

definition.description: Stores bill data. Associated with an order via 'orderId'.

params.name: billId
params.description: The unique identifier for the bill.

params.name: reservationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the reservation.

params.name: staffId
params.description: The unique identifier for the staff member.

definition.description: Stores notification data. Associated with a user via 'userId'.

params.name: notificationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the notification.

params.name: vendorId
params.description: The unique identifier for the vendor.

definition.description: Stores details for subscription plans, editable by super-admins.

params.name: planId
params.description: The unique identifier for the subscription plan (e.g., 'trial', 'basic').

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to support the restaurant management web app, prioritizing authorization independence, clarity, and scalability. User data is stored under `/users/{userId}`, enabling path-based ownership. Orders are stored in `/orders/{orderId}` and linked to users via the `customerId` field. Menu items are stored in `/menu/{menuItemId}`, inventory items in `/inventory/{inventoryItemId}`, bills in `/bills/{billId}`, reservations in `/reservations/{reservationId}`, staff in `/staff/{staffId}`, notifications in `/notifications/{notificationId}`, and vendors in `/vendors/{vendorId}`. Each collection is structured to ensure homogeneous security posture. The structure enables secure `list` operations and prevents rules from being filters by storing data with similar access control requirements in the same collections. Denormalization, specifically of user roles if access to certain collections needed to be role based (admin, staff) into those collections, would further promote Authorization Independence.
